message:
feat: R2-backed WASI VFS, Zig crypto (SHA-512, AES-256-GCM), KV bindings, http.ServeFile, SSE, CI pipeline

- R2-backed WASI filesystem: preload/flush lifecycle with DO SQLite index,
  /tmp (ephemeral) and /data (persistent) preopen dirs, full WASI syscalls
- Zig crypto fills: SHA-512 and AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt via CGo
- KV bindings: Go SDK (KVGet/Put/Delete/List) via multi-fetch protocol,
  working through both Worker and Durable Object paths
- http.ServeFile + FileServer with MIME type detection (20+ types)
- http.Flusher interface (no-op, SSE patterns work via full-body delivery)
- CI pipeline: health-check polling loop replaces blind sleep
- 108 tests passing across 5 test files

files.patch:
@@ -41,8 +41,17 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build Go + Zig WASM
         run: npm run build:go
 
-      - name: Start dev server and run tests
+      - name: Start dev server
         run: |
-          (cd worker && npx wrangler dev --port 8787) &
-          sleep 5
-          npm test
+          cd worker && npx wrangler dev --port 8787 &
+          # Wait for server to be ready
+          for i in $(seq 1 30); do
+            if curl -s http://localhost:8787/ > /dev/null 2>&1; then
+              echo "Server ready after ${i}s"
+              break
+            fi
+            sleep 1
+          done
+
+      - name: Run tests
+        run: npm test

@@ -2,11 +2,21 @@ name = "gomode"
 main = "src/worker.ts"
 compatibility_date = "2024-12-01"
 
+# R2: persistent filesystem storage
+[[r2_buckets]]
+binding = "FS_BUCKET"
+bucket_name = "gomode-fs"
+
+# KV: key-value store
+[[kv_namespaces]]
+binding = "KV"
+id = "gomode-kv"
+
 [durable_objects]
 bindings = [
   { name = "GO_DO", class_name = "GoDO" }
 ]
 
 [[migrations]]
 tag = "v1"
-new_classes = ["GoDO"]
+new_sqlite_classes = ["GoDO"]
